finding: The audited writer readiness ladder treated every non-PASS step as a hard current-evidence write blocker. That made a stale single-run PAPER snapshot look like the same class of blocker as the missing continuous writer.
patch: Readiness ladder steps now carry evidence_blocker_level, action_owner, operator_review_required, and non-live regeneration blocker fields. A stale single-run audited PAPER snapshot is a WARNING that blocks live review but does not hard-block non-live current-truth regeneration.
acceptance_conditions: SINGLE_RUN_AUDITED_SNAPSHOT with STALE is WARNING, not CRITICAL_BLOCKER
stale display-only snapshot blocks live review but not non-live regeneration
CONTINUOUS_CURRENT_EVIDENCE_WRITER remains the critical current-truth blocker
dashboard schema accepts and validates the closed severity/action-owner fields
open contract gap count remains 13 and live/scale flags remain false
blockers_precisely_narrowed: stale audited PAPER snapshot is separated from continuous writer implementation/reconciliation blockers
operator review is not required for routine stale snapshot refresh
critical blocker count and warning count are visible for operator triage
